prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 57 名，近年排名稳步上升（2021 年 65→2026 年 57），学校综合实力持续增强；2025 年声誉偏负面（教授考核事件）；抖音热度排名第 73、评价为「一般」，曝光度中等；未见明显投档断档记录；法学 A、应用经济学 A-，均为该校核心优势，对经管法类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 财经政法类专业社会热度分化观望，法学仍为热门；本省 2026 年总考生约 15.4 万，较 2025 年（约 11.6 万）大幅增加约 32%，物理类考生估算约 11.1 万（2025 年 8.4 万），竞争显著加剧；省控线 2026 年缺失，；学校位于湖北武汉，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅前移、2026 年缩招 12.5% 及本省物理类考生增加约 32%，供需两端博弈：考生大增推高位次，缩招拉低位次，但考生增幅远超缩招幅度，预计竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约 6242 名，区间 5742–6742 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 6184→7894→11259→14146→6532, with significant backward shifts in 2023 and 2024, and a notable forward shift to 6532 in 2025, showing drastic fluctuations with an amplitude exceeding 7500 positions in the last two years. The baseline for 2025 is around 6532. The provincial science/physics enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 22→23→24→26→24 students respectively, with a 2026 plan of 21 students, a reduction of 3 students (-12.5%) compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 57th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a steady upward trend in recent years (from 65th in 2021 to 57th in 2026), indicating continuously strengthening comprehensive strength. In 2025, reputation was slightly negative (professor assessment incident); Douyin popularity ranked 73rd with an evaluation of 'average', moderate exposure. No obvious admission gaps recorded. Law rated A, Applied Economics rated A-, both core advantages, strongly attracting students interested in economics, management, and law.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of economics, finance, and law majors is divided and cautious, with law still being popular. In 2026, the total number of provincial examinees is approximately 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% from 2025 (approximately 116,000). Estimated physics category examinees are about 111,000 (84,000 in 2025), intensifying competition. Provincial control line for 2026 is missing. The university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, not a local university, with no local admission preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant forward shift in 2025 rankings, a 12.5% enrollment reduction in 2026, and an approximately 32% increase in provincial physics category examinees, supply and demand are in a tug-of-war: a large increase in examinees pushes rankings higher, while enrollment reduction pulls them lower, but the examinee increase far exceeds the enrollment reduction, leading to slightly intensified competition. Predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6242, with a range of 5742–6742.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (5742–6742), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<5742), you can aim for Tier 1 majors like Law and Accounting. If your ranking is near the upper limit (>6742), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 as a safety.
